summary: Comprehensive testing of Country-Based Insurance Pricing feature completed. Backend APIs (GET all, GET by country, GET fallback, POST, PUT, DELETE) all working correctly. Frontend Admin Dashboard Insurance tab displays table with country-based prices, Add Country Price button opens modal with country dropdown, Edit/Delete buttons work. Delete is disabled for Default entry. TripBuilder fetches insurance by destination country.

issues: React hydration warning about <tr>/<span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

GET_all_insurance_prices.details: GET /api/settings/insurance returns list of all insurance_prices with insurance_prices key wrapper

GET_insurance_fallback_to_default.details: GET /api/settings/insurance?country=Brazil returns Default fallback pricing (50 AED)

POST_create_new_country.details: POST /api/settings/insurance creates new country price entry with all fields

POST_duplicate_country_fails.details: POST fails with 400 if country already exists

POST_empty_country_fails.details: POST fails with 400 if country is empty

DELETE_default_fails.details: DELETE returns 400 for Default entry (cannot delete fallback)

admin_dashboard_insurance_tab.details: Insurance tab shows table with Country, Price/Person, Currency, Min Coverage, Max Age, Description, Actions columns

admin_dashboard_add_country_modal.details: Add Country Price button opens modal with country dropdown, price, currency, coverage, age, description fields

admin_dashboard_edit_button.details: Edit button (pencil icon) visible on each row

admin_dashboard_delete_button.details: Delete button (trash icon) visible on non-Default rows, hidden for Default

tripbuilder_insurance_fetch.details: TripBuilder.jsx lines 56-73 fetches insurance based on destination city's country with fallback

critical_code_review_comments: Backend insurance API is well-implemented with proper fallback logic
Frontend AdminDashboard Insurance tab has full CRUD functionality
TripBuilder correctly fetches insurance by looking up destination city's country
Default entry protection prevents accidental deletion of fallback pricing
Minor React hydration warnings in table don't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: 3 insurance entries seeded: Default (50 AED), Georgia (40 AED), United Arab Emirates (75 AED)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Country-based insurance pricing fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/settings/insurance (no param=list all, with country=specific or fallback), POST/PUT/DELETE for CRUD. Admin Dashboard > Insurance tab shows table and Add/Edit/Delete actions. TripBuilder fetches insurance via useEffect based on destination city's country. Default entry cannot be deleted (400 error). API properly returns Default as fallback for unrecognized countries.
